name: dqcolorimetry-webapp-beta
description: Beta browser companion implementation for TIPICA image-based plate colorimetry workflows.
author: Pasquale Palladino

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && vite build
scripts.smoke:plate-configurator: node -e "fs.rmSync('.tmp-smoke', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc --pretty false --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-smoke scripts/smokePlateConfigurator.ts && node .tmp-smoke/scripts/smokePlateConfigurator.js
scripts.smoke:configurator-persistence: node -e "fs.rmSync('.tmp-configurator-persistence', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc --pretty false --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-configurator-persistence scripts/smokeConfiguratorPersistence.ts && node .tmp-configurator-persistence/scripts/smokeConfiguratorPersistence.js
scripts.smoke:fitting-parity: node -e "fs.rmSync('.tmp-fitting', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc --pretty false --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-fitting scripts/smokeFittingParity.ts && node .tmp-fitting/scripts/smokeFittingParity.js
scripts.smoke:image-qc-metadata: node -e "fs.rmSync('.tmp-image-qc', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc --pretty false --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-image-qc scripts/smokeImageQcMetadata.ts && node .tmp-image-qc/scripts/smokeImageQcMetadata.js
scripts.smoke:overview-rows: node -e "fs.rmSync('.tmp-overview', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc --pretty false --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-overview scripts/smokeOverviewRows.ts && node .tmp-overview/scripts/smokeOverviewRows.js
scripts.smoke:stored-calibration-cielab: node -e "fs.rmSync('.tmp-cielab', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc --pretty false --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --skipLibCheck --jsx react-jsx --outDir .tmp-cielab scripts/smokeStoredCalibrationCielab.ts && node .tmp-cielab/scripts/smokeStoredCalibrationCielab.js
scripts.check:post-codex: npm run build && npm run smoke:plate-configurator
